items.text: Column is nullable / not-nullable as per requirement spec
Column data type matches spec (e.g. accepts long int / bigint range)
Primary key uniqueness is enforced
Foreign key constraints are enforced correctly
Default values are applied correctly on insert
Column length / precision is validated (no silent truncation)
Indexes exist on frequently queried columns
No orphan records remain after a delete
Cascading delete / update behaves as expected
Duplicate records are prevented by unique constraints
Data is not truncated or rounded unexpectedly on insert
Insert persists all fields correctly
Update modifies only the intended fields
Delete removes the correct record(s) only
Read query returns the expected row count
Rollback works correctly on failure mid-transaction
Commit persists data after a successful transaction
Concurrent writes do not cause deadlocks
Isolation level prevents dirty reads
Migration script runs cleanly on a fresh database
Migration is idempotent (safe to re-run)
Rollback script reverts changes cleanly
Existing data is unaffected by the schema change

modules.name: UI Testing
modules.description: Layout, forms, navigation and cross-browser behaviour

items.text: Page renders correctly across target browsers
Responsive layout works on mobile / tablet / desktop breakpoints
No overlapping, cropped or clipped elements
Fonts, spacing and colors match the design spec
Images load with proper alt text
Required field validation triggers on submit
Inline error messages display correctly
Field accepts only valid input formats
Max length is enforced on text fields
Success confirmation shown after valid submission
All links navigate to the correct destination
Browser back button behaves as expected
Breadcrumbs reflect the current page location
Active nav item is highlighted correctly
Buttons are clickable and give visual feedback
Loading state shown during async actions
Modals open and close correctly
Tooltips display correctly on hover / focus
Verified on Chrome
Verified on Firefox
Verified on Safari
Verified on Edge
Verified on iOS Safari
Verified on Android Chrome

modules.name: API Testing
modules.description: Status codes, payloads, auth and error handling

items.text: API returns HTTP 200 on a successful request
Appropriate 4xx returned for invalid input
401 / 403 returned for unauthorized access
500 is not returned for a valid request
Response time is within the agreed SLA
Response schema matches the API contract
All required fields are present in the response
Data types match the spec (string / int / bool / date)
Pagination metadata is correct (total, page, limit)
Null / empty values are handled gracefully
API accepts a valid request payload
Invalid / malformed payload returns a clear error
Missing required fields rejected with 400
Query params filter results correctly
Idempotency respected for repeat PUT / DELETE
Valid token grants access
Expired / invalid token is rejected
Correct Content-Type header returned
Rate limiting is enforced
CORS headers configured correctly
Error response includes a meaningful message
Error response follows the standard error schema
No stack trace leaked in a production error response

modules.name: Security Testing
modules.description: AuthN/AuthZ, input validation and data protection

items.text: Unauthorized user cannot access a protected endpoint
Role-based access control is enforced correctly
Session expires after the configured timeout
Password reset flow doesn't leak account existence
Brute-force login attempts are throttled
SQL injection payloads are safely rejected
XSS payloads are sanitized / escaped in output
File upload restricted to allowed types and size
Path traversal attempts are blocked
Command injection payloads are rejected
Sensitive data encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS)
Sensitive data encrypted at rest
PII is masked in logs
No secrets or keys committed in source
API keys are not exposed in client-side code
Session token invalidated on logout
CSRF protection enforced on state-changing requests
JWT signature is validated
Token cannot be reused after expiry
Security headers present (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS)
Unnecessary ports / services are closed
Verbose error / debug mode disabled in production
Dependencies scanned for known vulnerabilities
Consumer-driven contract tests pass
API versioning handled without breaking consumers
Backward compatibility maintained for existing clients
Service handles downstream timeout gracefully
Retry logic works as expected on transient failure
Circuit breaker trips after the failure threshold
Correct fallback response returned when dependency is down
Eventual consistency achieved within the expected window
Distributed transaction / saga completes or compensates correctly
Duplicate event processing is idempotent
Message queue delivers at-least-once as expected
Service emits structured logs with a correlation / trace ID
Health check endpoint reports accurate status
Metrics exposed for monitoring (latency, error rate)
Distributed trace spans connect correctly across services
Service starts correctly with required env configuration
Service scales horizontally under load
Rolling deployment causes no downtime
Service degrades gracefully when a dependency is unavailable

modules.name: Performance Testing
modules.description: Load, stress, scalability and resource usage

items.text: System meets response time SLA under expected load
Throughput meets target requests/sec
No memory leak observed during sustained load
Error rate stays below threshold under load
System recovers gracefully after peak stress
Auto-scaling triggers correctly under load
No data loss during scale-up / scale-down
System degrades gracefully beyond capacity
CPU utilization stays within acceptable range under load
Memory utilization stays within acceptable range under load
Database connection pool is not exhausted under load
No excessive I/O wait under load

modules.name: Accessibility Testing
modules.description: Keyboard, screen reader and visual accessibility

items.text: All interactive elements are reachable via keyboard
Focus order follows a logical reading order
Visible focus indicator present on all controls
No keyboard trap present
Images have descriptive alt text
Form fields have associated labels
ARIA roles / attributes used correctly
Dynamic content changes are announced (live regions)
Color contrast meets WCAG AA minimum
Content remains readable when zoomed to 200%
UI is usable without relying on color alone
Text resizes without loss of content or function
App installs and launches without crashing
Core flows work on all target OS versions
Push notifications are delivered and open correctly
Deep links open the correct screen
App handles orientation change without data loss
App resumes correctly from background
App handles incoming call / notification interruption
Low battery / low storage handled gracefully
App handles offline mode gracefully
App recovers correctly when network reconnects
API calls retried appropriately on poor connectivity

modules.name: Regression Testing
modules.description: Confirming existing behaviour still holds after a change

items.text: Previously passing critical user flows still pass
No new console / application errors introduced
Existing automated test suite passes
Previously fixed bugs remain fixed
Dependent modules / features unaffected by the change
Third-party integrations still function correctly
Data migrations haven't broken existing records
